key_responsibilities: Work with TypeScript, HTML/CSS, and Tailwind CSS to improve and maintain front-end functionality.
Contribute to back-end updates in Node.js-based applications where needed.
Write and optimize database queries using PostgreSQL and MongoDB.
Build and maintain Python scripts for scraping, automation, and AI-supported workflows.
Support the development and refinement of AI-driven tools, automations, and integrations.
Create wireframes or mockups in Figma for responsive web pages and feature updates.
Write PRDs and clear documentation to support development and implementation.
Fix bugs and make updates within existing web application codebases.
Collaborate with internal non-technical stakeholders to understand needs and identify opportunities for process improvement and automation.
Help translate business needs into clear, actionable technical deliverables.
relevant_data: HomeLife Realty Services is a real estate company with 51-200 employees, founded in 1985.
Recently, they launched a nationwide cash back program for buyers, sellers, and renters to enhance client satisfaction.
The company has an employee rating of 3.9 out of 5 stars, indicating positive employee sentiment, with a 60% recommendation rate.
